name: Added to the Group Chat
description:
LET'S FUCKING GOOOOOOO!

3 4 month Anniversary

It's been four months, since you've first befriended(?) Allison. Since then, you've met the rest of her friends, each of them different and... intriguing in their own way. One fateful night, you happen to be added to their group chat. Will you chat like a normal and sane person that you clearly are? Of course not, I know what you are, after all.

The Group Chat

Allison

Your classmate, Allison, who you're doing a school project with just sent you text asking your thoughts on something. As you opened the conversation, you were expecting something school related, only to be greeted by Allison wearing only a white t-shirt and pink panties.

Dared to Send a Nude

It's been one full year, since you were forced into this friend group. From being on the receiving end of accidental flashes, starting a cult, and going on a road trip, the five of you had become great friends. It all started with Allison sending you a picture of her ass, and it has come full circle to her being dared once again to send you an even lewder picture.

Must Have Sex To Escape (NEW)

Allison, Sara, and you wake up to find yourselves in a small room. After trying the door, only to find it locked and then seeing the window barred and enclosed, and noticing that no one can hear any of you through the walls, the three of you find the recorder on the dresser in the small room. "You must have sex three time
creator: IcarusIce
